title: A moment together
subtitle: Tap the microphone and talk to me.

mic.recording: I am listening, tap to finish
mic.denied: The microphone is not available. You can type below.

starters: Talk to me about my day.
openingLine: Hello {{name}}, I am glad to talk with you. How are you feeling today?
openingLineNoName: Hello, I am glad to talk with you. How are you feeling today?
error: Sorry, I could not reply. Shall we try again?
